audit.auditor: blind 3-panel (no-schema); combo_density=0.837 unanimous (independently recounted 41/49 participants, 8 legible standalones); all 18 L5 signatures verbatim; L3-legal; no dead archetype

issues.what: A few cards read grain:<suit> (e.g. grain:glaze/song) whose count is grown mainly by naturally-suited pieces in play rather than an explicit mark-grain writer of that exact suit; participants via room/chain regardless.
issues.fix: game-loop confirms each mark-grain suit has a live reader and each grain-read has a writer; cosmetic, non-blocking.

issues.what: The starter pool realizes the L5 chains + L6 numbers; whether the six starter decks are balanced in actual play (win-rate, combo reliability) is asserted structurally, not simulated.
issues.fix: game-loop derives per-archetype balance from bot sims over this pool and tunes card numbers within the locked shapes (D-005.3).

summary: Layer 7 starter_pool: 49 concrete starter cards as data (7 shared apprentice + 6 archetypes x ~7). Every card composes from the 14 L3 primitives with every read in the closed enum; the six L5 signature chains reproduced VERBATIM under L6 numbers (Silver Refrain wd5, Ripe Mending ceiling9, Eveners C2 thread/wd1, the four m2/c4 signatures) with no mark lowered or raised; exactly one brim (Fairwright capstone, band over-ceiling); court gates on chain never spends gleam; soothe cap:last-red node-local. combo_density=0.837 (41/49 participants; 8 legible standalones = 2 warm/keep + 6 on-dawn draw-fixers), clearing >=0.5. Each archetype opens from the shared deck + supports (all C1 marks <=3; Mannerly links:2+links:2 -> court, Gleaner mark-5 soothe on-ramp); no dead archetype. Blind 3-auditor panel unanimous PASS. AUTO layer -> LOCK_OK on clean napkin -> DESIGN_COMPLETE. Per-archetype play balance -> game-loop (D-005.3).
